description: Rules enforcing privacy-first, secure-by-default principles across {{PROJECT_NAME}}. Security is a non-negotiable constraint, not a post-launch concern.
enforcedBy: {{PROJECT_NAME}} AI Security Auditor — activated on every code generation task that touches data storage, API calls, authentication, or external integrations.

_ai_agent_instructions.CRITICAL: Before outputting any code, run the Security Self-Audit. Any P0 violation must be fixed before output.
security_self_audit: CHECK 1 — Secrets: Does any generated code contain hardcoded API keys, passwords, tokens? If YES → replace with env vars. BLOCK.
CHECK 2 — Storage: Does code write to localStorage directly (not via storageManager)? If YES → refactor. BLOCK.
CHECK 3 — External Calls: Does code call external domains? If YES → verify on allow-list. BLOCK if not.
CHECK 4 — Data Logging: Does code log user PII, tokens, or sensitive data? If YES → remove. BLOCK.
CHECK 5 — Auth: Does new API route lack authentication/authorization? If YES → add guard. BLOCK.

rules.name: Private by Default
rules.description: All data, APIs, and storage must assume private access unless explicitly marked public.
guidelines: Never log sensitive user data, tokens, or session identifiers to console
All API routes must implement authentication AND authorization by default
Data fetching must apply user-scoped filters
Any public-facing endpoint must be explicitly designed and reviewed

rules.name: Local Storage & IndexedDB via storageManager Only
rules.description: All client-side persistence must go through the project's storageManager utility.

rules.name: No Hardcoded Secrets — Zero Tolerance
rules.description: Secrets must NEVER appear in source code. Zero exceptions.
rules.correct_pattern: const apiKey = process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY; if (!apiKey) throw new Error('Missing GEMINI_API_KEY');

rules.name: External API Access Control
rules.description: All external API calls must be on the project's API allow-list.
guidelines: Check allowed-apis.json before adding new external call

rules.name: Signed Links & Expiry for User Assets
rules.description: All user-related asset links must be time-limited and signed.
guidelines: Use signed URLs with TTL (default: 15 min)
Log all link generation for audit

rules.name: Input Validation & Sanitization
rules.description: All user input must be validated on both client and server.
guidelines: Use Zod schemas for form and API input
Validate on server before DB ops
